title: Skill
description: Schema for SKILL.md YAML frontmatter in the Dudamel Agents Marketplace

name.description: Skill identifier in kebab-case with domain prefix (e.g. ios-code-review)

description.description: Short description of what the skill does

disable-model-invocation.description: Whether to disable model invocation for this skill

user-invocable.description: Whether the skill can be invoked directly by users

allowed-tools.description: List of tools the skill is allowed to use

model.description: Model to use for this skill
